effort_complexity.rationale: Three independent, small, mechanical swaps of a re-derived value for the JSON field that already has it.

design_decisions.choice: internal/ears prefers spec.json's ears_keyword over spec.md text (spec.json-first), diverging from internal/gate/trace.go's spec.md-first ordering.
design_decisions.rationale: trace.go also runs text-level prose checks that need a markdown body spec.json cannot supply; ears.go's only job is per-AC EARS classification, which ears_keyword already answers directly. Narrow — one function's source-of-truth order, reversible by flipping the branch order, does not touch trace.go.

design_decisions.choice: Accept the PatternComplex precision loss when classifying from spec.json's stored ears_keyword instead of re-deriving from prose (spec_record.go's writer cannot emit a keyword representing 2+ preconditions).
design_decisions.rationale: spec_record.go is not a touchpoint of this slice; AC-04 scopes this slice to which source future reads use, not to improving what the writer computes. Follow-up slice on spec_record.go's classifyEARSKeyword is the correct owner if unacceptable.

design_decisions.choice: Result.Line becomes a 1-based ordinal array-index (not a markdown line number) for spec.json-sourced ACs.
design_decisions.rationale: There is no physical markdown line for a JSON record; an ordinal position keeps the field non-zero, deterministic, and useful for a human pointer ("AC #3"). Doc comment updated to say so explicitly.

design_decisions.choice: ViolationsSummary returns only the first proof.json.not_delivered entry (trimmed, 200-char truncated), not the full list joined.
design_decisions.rationale: Preserves the existing one-line paging-summary contract and truncation budget. A future consumer wanting the full list already has direct access to proof.json.not_delivered — no new API invented for a need nobody has surfaced.

test_commands: gofmt -l internal/account/notify.go internal/account/notify_test.go internal/ears/ears.go internal/ears/ears_test.go cmd/sworn/ledger.go cmd/sworn/ledger_test.go internal/run/slice.go
